last_completed_round.direction_name: Restore The Best Measured PTX Grouping Window On The Accepted Surface
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 16 turned the current PTX control branch back into a net negative. The implementation changed only one new hot-band seam, but a source diff versus the best measured PTX commit `489574e` now shows two bounded drifts on the PTX winner surface: the round-15 future_tile_k hoist and the round-16 prologue wait retime. The latest run regressed from 24.17100811 ms to 24.19086361 ms even though barrier dipped slightly from 5.21% to 5.16%, because long-scoreboard widened back from 7.08% to 7.16% and the end-to-end result moved away from both the 24.17859173 ms accepted base and the 24.16427231 ms best-known run. The next move should therefore be to restore the best measured PTX surface before spending more rounds on alternate families.

notes: Build passed for round 18/100. Node A will measure the result next.
